hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen on explicit local geometric descriptors—specifically the active-site motif, per-site coordination numbers, and the adsorbate-to-first-shell distances—in addition to (S, E, L) will reduce the Fréchet Distance between generated and real latent embeddings on the HEA test set by at least 30% and increase the cosine similarity of generated versus ground-truth shell-2 compositions by at least 0.05 (absolute) compared to the original CompGen conditioned only on (S, E, L).
